summary: Iteration 67: Narrow Ridge Suggest Endpoint Tests - 25/25 tests PASSED (100%). Verified GET /api/implant-library/suggest returns narrow_options (diameter <=3.5mm) and narrow_ridge_warning when bone_width<6. Tested bone_type parameter for drilling protocols (D1-D4). Verified POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto with narrow_ridge_blocked=true when bone_width<3mm. Confirmed 'Narrow Ridge' procedure option works.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/implant-library/suggest correctly returns narrow_options (array of implants with diameter <=3.5mm) when bone_width < 6mm
narrow_ridge_warning correctly returned when selected system has no narrow diameter implants (e.g., Bredent Copa Sky)
bone_type query parameter correctly maps to drilling protocols in narrow_ridge_evaluation (D1=full_drilling, D2=slight_undersizing, D3=undersized_drilling, D4=osteotome_or_minimal_drilling)
POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto correctly returns narrow_ridge_blocked=true with empty recommended_systems when bone_width < 3mm
narrow_options correctly filtered to only include implants with diameter <= 3.5mm (verified with Osstem TS III, Osstem MS, BioHorizons Narrow Diameter)
Boundary conditions correctly handled: 6mm = no narrow_options, 5.99mm = has narrow_options
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing implant library data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Narrow Ridge Suggest Endpoint fully tested. GET /api/implant-library/suggest now returns narrow_options (implants with diameter <=3.5mm) and narrow_ridge_warning when bone_width<6. bone_type parameter correctly maps to drilling protocols. Systems tested: Osstem TS III (has narrow options: 3.0, 3.5mm), Bredent Copa Sky (no narrow options, returns warning), Osstem MS (has narrow options: 2.0-3.5mm), BioHorizons Narrow Diameter (has narrow options: 3.0, 3.4mm).

suggest_endpoint_narrow_options.osstem_ts3_narrow_options_returned: PASS - Returns narrow_options with 3.0, 3.5mm diameters when bone_width=4
suggest_endpoint_narrow_options.osstem_ts3_bone_type_d3_drilling_protoco: PASS - Returns undersized_drilling for D3 bone
suggest_endpoint_narrow_options.bredent_copa_sky_narrow_ridge_warning: PASS - Returns warning when no narrow options available
suggest_endpoint_narrow_options.boundary_6mm_no_narrow_options: PASS - Exactly 6mm does NOT return narrow_options

suggest_auto_endpoint.narrow_ridge_evaluation_bone_width_5mm: PASS - Returns narrow_ridge_evaluation with mild_narrow classification
suggest_auto_endpoint.narrow_ridge_procedure_works: PASS - 'Narrow Ridge' as procedure works correctly

procedure_options_endpoint.narrow_ridge_in_procedures_list: PASS - 'Narrow Ridge' appears with D1-D4 compatibility

evaluate_narrow_ridge_endpoint.narrow_in_molar_warning: PASS - Triggered when diameter<=3.5 and molar region

tested_endpoints.GET /api/implant-library/suggest: 200 - narrow_options, narrow_ridge_warning, bone_type parameter all working
